## Checklist
- [ ] Spec updated or explicitly confirmed unchanged
- [ ] Acceptance criteria validated with evidence
- [ ] Architecture boundaries respected (domain/application/infrastructure/presentation)
- [ ] Convention checks respected (`unwrap/expect/panic` not introduced)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for changed behavior
- [ ] RAG baseline vs enhanced evidence attached (if RAG touched)
- [ ] KV cache policy impact assessed (if cache/provider/runtime touched)
